pr.title: Record: Legal Score-First TTT + Parallel Muon — val_bpb 1.1219 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines PR#414 stack with Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon optimizer and inference_mode score-first TTT that adapts only after scoring each val chunk.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT explicitly trains on validation token chunks during evaluation, so all adaptation happens on the validation shard.
techniques: Legal score-first TTT under inference_mode scoring
Parameter Banking with Parallel Muon optimizer
SGD/momentum TTT that freezes early blocks and updates per 32K chunk
